description: A surface_token minted for one mount of pack A (audience.pack_id: waiveo/slidecast) is presented against a management-API request attributable to a different pack B (waiveo/weather) -- even though the token is otherwise unexpired, unrevoked, and was validly issued, a server MUST refuse it with SURFACE_TOKEN_AUDIENCE_MISMATCH because the request's own target pack does not match the token's audience.pack_id.

expected.reason: token audience.pack_id does not match the pack the request targets; the token is otherwise valid (unexpired, unrevoked) but its authority does not extend to a different pack
